welcome.heading: Welcome
welcome.body: Select a customer from the sidebar to view their profile, policies, and start a chat.

policies.emptyProspect: No policies yet — this is a prospect.

chat.selectCustomer: Select a customer to start a chat.
chat.emptyPlaceholder: Ask a question or pick a suggestion below.
chat.attachDocument: Attach a policy document (PDF, image, or text)
chat.placeholderWithAttachment: Add a note or just send to extract the policy...

samplePolicies.cta: Need a test file? Download a sample
samplePolicies.heading: Sample policy for {{name}}
samplePolicies.subtext: Synthetic 3rd-party policies for testing the upload flow.

customer.coverageGap: What coverage gap do I have and how can I address it?
customer.premiumDelta: Why is your premium higher/lower than competitors?
customer.claimsModel: Do you offer cashless claims at hospitals, or only reimbursement?
customer.incomeVsLumpSum: Do you offer income replacement or lump-sum payout options?
customer.mentalHealthMaternity: Do you cover mental health, maternity, or alternative treatments?
customer.outpatientDentalOptical: Do you cover outpatient treatments, dental, or optical?
customer.dayOneCover: What's your day-one cover vs. waiting period compared to others?
customer.preExistingWaiting: What pre-existing condition waiting period do you have vs. competitors?

prospect.firstProducts: What insurance should this prospect consider first?
prospect.discovery: Help me start a discovery conversation
prospect.bestProducts: What are the best products given their profile?
prospect.whyUnicorn: Why should they choose Unicorn over BigRival?
prospect.qualifyQuestions: What questions should I ask to qualify this prospect?

comparator.heading: Comparator
comparator.intro: Compare insurance products across Unicorn Insurance and its competitors. Select a product type, then pick between 2 and 4 products to compare.
comparator.selectType: Pick a product type to see the products available for comparison.
comparator.noProductsForType: No products available for this type.
comparator.comparingHint: This takes 10–20 seconds while the assistant reads each product document.
comparator.maxProducts: You can compare at most {{max}} products.

voice.heading: Voice Chat
voice.selectCustomer: Select a customer to start a voice conversation.
voice.emptyConnected: Type a message below, or press Start voice chat to speak. Clear resets the conversation.
voice.hintText: The assistant responds in text only. Press Start voice chat to speak and hear responses.
voice.hintVoice: Voice chat is active — the assistant will respond with voice and text. Press Stop voice chat to type only.

recommendation.loading: Analyzing coverage and looking for gaps...
recommendation.noGaps: No material coverage gaps identified — the customer is well covered for their profile.
